title: Codex Trace
description: Normalized trace/log record for observability across services.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the log record.

traceId.description: Trace identifier spanning a request or workflow.

parentId.description: Parent trace node id for chain/replay traversal.

layer.description: Execution layer label (for example: ai-governance, engine, service, adapter, model).

policy.description: Policy profile/token id applied at this step.

action.description: Concrete action name executed at this step.

inputsHash.description: Digest of normalized input payload (no raw sensitive data).

prevHash.description: Previous record hash for append-only chain integrity.

recordHash.description: Current record hash for tamper detection and replay checks.

signature.description: Optional signature over canonical record for integrity verification.

eventId.description: Optional link back to an event id.

resource.description: Process or service metadata (service.name, version, region, host).

attributes.description: Structured key/value data for filtering and aggregation.

metrics.description: Numeric measurements associated with the log line.
